case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JOSE R PORTILLO GALDAMEZ

RETURN MAIL- NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT - SENT TO DEFENDANT UNABLE TO FORWARD.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GALDAMEZ, JOSE R PORTILLO $337.55 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $417.55 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-06-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC, REPRESENTED BY ANGEL GARCIA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSE R. PORTILLO GALDAMEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
